title: Original Multiverse attempt
permitted_uses: Supports historical context about Multiverse's intended business boundaries, previous slices, and prior implementation shape.
Supports reconstruction of decisions, specs, scenarios, and acceptance tests when reviewed by the swarm.
claims_supported: The prior project treated refusal, explicit repository configuration, and provider/core separation as central constraints.
The prior project had a pnpm monorepo with CLI, core, provider contracts, providers, and acceptance/contract tests.
claims_not_supported: The prior implementation should be copied wholesale.
The prior latest state is automatically the desired fresh implementation plan.
